message:
fix: kagent card display issues — light mode, error boundary, refresh animation (#9458)

- Fix invisible percentage text in KagentSecurity light mode (text-white -> text-foreground)
- Add ErrorBoundary wrapper to KagentSecurity card (matching other kagent cards)
- Add isRefreshing to all 4 kagent cards + KagentiAgentFleet for refresh spinner
- Fix KagentiAgentFleet skeleton flash on background refresh (only show on initial load)
- Show N/A for replica counts on non-Deployment agents
- Extract magic number percentage thresholds to named constants

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:

- {agent.readyReplicas}/{agent.replicas} + {agent.replicas != null && agent.readyReplicas != null + ? `${agent.readyReplicas}/${agent.replicas}` + : 'N/A'}
